phases.phase_1_root_cause: usePlusHub localStorage stale state + cross-bundle nav diagnosed
phases.phase_2_architectural: TaoMiniAppShell + 5 panels in V2 bundle, /app/tao route, /v3/tao DELETED with cross-bundle redirect
phases.phase_4_build_deploy: Build PASS, PR #124 merged self-admin, CF Pages SUCCESS

root_cause_analysis.issue: NTS account real KHONG thay TAO icon on /app despite Playwright fixture seeing it
root_cause_analysis.cause_1: usePlusHub.readPinned() reads localStorage[uzg-plus-pinned-v1]. Existing users (e.g., NTS) with stale state from prior catalog iterations may have pinned ids missing 'tao'. Default pinned has tao, but users who previously pinned different apps see stale state.
root_cause_analysis.cause_2: PR #123 cross-bundle navigation (/v3/tao) felt broken - V2 PWA navigate('/v3/tao') triggered window.location.assign hard reload, perceived as failure
root_cause_analysis.fix_1: ensureTaoVisible() helper unions ALWAYS_PINNED_IDS=['tao'] into pinned set. Existing users transparently migrated.
root_cause_analysis.fix_2: TAO module merged into V2 bundle at /app/tao. Same-bundle navigation via react-router. /v3/tao deleted with cross-bundle redirect for legacy URLs.

architectural_change.before: TAO icon click -> navigate('/v3/tao') -> cross-bundle hard reload to V3 PWA SPA
architectural_change.after: TAO icon click -> navigate('/app/tao') -> V2 SPA renders TaoMiniAppShell (same-bundle)
architectural_change.v3_route_redirect: TaoCrossBundleRedirect in V3App.jsx redirects /v3/tao* -> /app/tao via window.location.assign

cases: TAO-MERGE-01: /app PLUS Hub renders with TAO icon visible (count >= 2)
TAO-MERGE-02: TAO icon present in 3 sections + route attr verifies /app/tao
TAO-MERGE-03: TAO icon click navigates to /app/tao (same-bundle)
TAO-MERGE-04: TaoMiniAppShell + 5 tabs + close button render
TAO-MERGE-05: Bat Tu tab default + V3 dark theme
TAO-MERGE-06: Tu Vi tab switch + render
TAO-MERGE-07: Phong Thuy tab switch + render
TAO-MERGE-08: Lich Van Nien tab switch + render
TAO-MERGE-09: AIER Tao tab + composer visible

method_4_app_catalog_inspection.tao_entry: id:"tao" + name:"TAO" present in V2 production bundle
